# Firmometr

> Firmometr is a Czech B2B company intelligence tool that aggregates data from public registries
> (ISIR insolvency register, DPH unreliable VAT payers, ARES, commercial register) into one profile.

## What it does
- Instant risk check for any Czech company by IČO or name
- Insolvency status (ISIR): clear / past debtor / active proceedings
- VAT reliability check (Ministry of Finance database)
- Company profile: directors, address, legal form, founding date (ARES + OR)
- Watchlist: monitor companies and receive email alerts on status changes

## Pricing
- Free: 5 searches per session, ISIR + VAT traffic light
- Solo (349 Kč/month): 50 watched companies, full alerts
- Enterprise: unlimited

## Key pages
- https://firmometr.cz — homepage and live search
- https://firmometr.cz/ceny — pricing
- https://firmometr.cz/search/{ico} — company profile (public)
